title: region — permissions
scope_suffix_convention: Every read permission may be seeded WITH a scope suffix (`.any`, `.tenant`). The base permission (no suffix) is the highest-tier variant, effectively `.tenant`. The ScopeSuffixResolver (shipped by the user module, consumed by every base repository) applies the corresponding WHERE clause at query build time. Region has no `.branch` / `.own` variants — regions are tenant-wide reference data + not branch-scoped.

permissions.name: regions.viewAny
permissions.description: Every tenant role reads the region list — regions are UI reference data (every currency + timezone + tax dropdown reads them).

permissions.name: regions.view
permissions.description: Single-row read. tax_config.registration_number is redacted unless the caller ALSO carries `regions.view.tax_registration`.

permissions.name: regions.view.tax_registration
permissions.description: Unredacted read of `tax_config.registration_number` (confidential-tier). Admin + owner only.

permissions.name: regions.create
permissions.description: Consumes 1 unit of the region_slot entitlement.

permissions.name: regions.update
permissions.description: Mutable fields: name, slug, timezone, locale, weekend_days, sort_order, subdivision_code, fiscal_year_start_month. tax_config edits require the higher `regions.update.tax_config` permission.

permissions.name: regions.update.tax_config
permissions.description: Separated from base update — tax_config mutations produce financial-record audit rows (7-year retention). Admin + owner.

permissions.name: regions.set_default
permissions.description: Flip is_default. Owner-only — the default region drives invoice calculations for legacy rows.

permissions.name: regions.archive
permissions.description: Refused when is_default=true OR when inbound rows exist.

permissions.name: regions.restore
permissions.description: Reverse of archive. Only within the 730-day retention window.

permissions.name: regions.delete
permissions.description: Owner only. Same guards as archive — plus the hard-delete happens only via PurgeArchivedRegionsJob after retention window.

permissions.name: regions.manage
permissions.description: Umbrella permission for the settings blueprint gate. Admin + owner.

permissions.name: platform.regions.view.tax_registration
permissions.description: Support-tier does NOT carry unredacted tax registration reads.
